description: Crystallize headless commerce tools for AI agents via Model Context Protocol
name: io.github.HayoDev/crystallize-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Your Crystallize tenant identifier (e.g. 'my-store'). Find it in your Crystallize dashboard URL: app.crystallize.com/{tenant}
environmentVariables.name: CRYSTALLIZE_TENANT_IDENTIFIER

environmentVariables.description: Access Token ID for authenticated API access. Create one at Settings > Access Tokens in your Crystallize dashboard. Optional — public catalogue and Discovery API work without auth.
environmentVariables.name: CRYSTALLIZE_ACCESS_TOKEN_ID

environmentVariables.description: Access Token Secret (paired with Access Token ID).
environmentVariables.name: CRYSTALLIZE_ACCESS_TOKEN_SECRET

environmentVariables.description: Static auth token (alternative to token ID/secret pair). Read-only.
environmentVariables.name: CRYSTALLIZE_STATIC_AUTH_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Controls which tools are available: 'read' (default, safe), 'write' (can create/update items), 'admin' (full access including webhooks).
environmentVariables.name: CRYSTALLIZE_ACCESS_MODE

title: Crystallize MCP
